_doc: A-02 concurrent session isolation вҖ” N session cases driven through the mainplanвҶ’tripвҶ’hotel chain in parallel. Each entry: sessionId (carried in A2A metadata), input (user-stated travel-planning ask covering who/when/where/duration/hotel-type), expectedKeyword (required substring of the final artifact's text). Keyword choice rule: the destination city вҖ” MUST be a Chinese provincial capital or municipality directly under the central government вҖ” and the LLM cannot reasonably omit it when returning a trip + hotel plan; the keywords across cases must NOT be substrings of one another.
